SUPERIOR COURT OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES

JANE HENDERSON,
    Plaintiff,
v.
ACME CORPORATION,
    Defendant.

Case No.: 24STCV12345

PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE,
TO DEFENDANT ACME CORPORATION

Propounding Party: Plaintiff Jane Henderson
Responding Party: Defendant Acme Corporation
Set Number: 1

  DEFINITIONS

As used herein, "DOCUMENT" means any writing.
"YOU" means Defendant Acme Corporation.
"INCIDENT" means the termination of employment.

INSTRUCTIONS

Answer each interrogatory separately and fully.

 1. State all facts supporting your decision to terminate Plaintiff.

 2.   Identify all documents relating to performance reviews of Plaintiff.

3)  State the names of all persons who witnessed the decision to terminate Plaintiff.

4. For each complaint of discrimination, state: (a) the date; (b) the person to whom
the complaint was made; and (c) the substance of the complaint.
